ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel package */,
  "package_name" TEXT /* Name of the travel package */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the travel package */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the travel package (e.g., peak, off-peak) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the travel package in days */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the travel package */,
  "max_guests" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests allowed per booking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the package was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the package (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodation_types" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation type */,
  "accommodation_name" TEXT /* Name of the accommodation type (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accommodation type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people that can stay in the accommodation */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* A list of amenities provided in the accommodation (e.g., Wi-Fi, air conditioning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel package */,
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accommodation type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the accommodation type */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price period */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the price period */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the accommodation (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_accommodation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("accommodation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales, customer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel package */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "travel_dates" TEXT /* Travel dates for the booking */,
  "total_guests" INTEGER /* Total number of guests in the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., peak, off-peak) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodation_prices" (
  "accommodation_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation price record */,
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accommodation type */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the accommodation type */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price period */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the price period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodation_prices_accommodation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("accommodation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_accommodations" (
  "package_accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package accommodation record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel package */,
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accommodation type */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the accommodation (e.g., single, double, triple) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_accommodations_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_accommodations_accommodation_id FOREIGN KEY ("accommodation_id") REFERENCES accommodation_types ("accommodation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "travel_package_prices" (
  "travel_package_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel package price record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the travel package */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the travel package */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price period */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the price period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_package_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_package_prices_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES travel_packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_payments" (
  "customer_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_bookings" (
  "customer_booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer booking */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "total_guests" INTEGER /* Total number of guests in the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_bookings_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)
